title: [IOS]Analytics - Feedback Opened
scenario: Verify that opening the Feedback form (Mopinion) logs the event and updates dashboard metrics (graph, last 30 min, country, gender, per session, app version/build/environment) after a few hours.
steps: Wait a few hours for event counts to update.
Verify the graph for the event is displayed.
Verify the events in the last 30 minutes section is displayed.
Verify the event count by country section is displayed.
Verify the event count by gender section is displayed.
Verify the events per session section is displayed.
Verify the app version section is displayed.
Verify the app build section is displayed.
Verify the app environment section is displayed.
expected: The Feedback form (Mopinion) opens successfully. After a few hours, event counts are updated. The default dashboard displays the following elements: graph for the event, events in the last 30 minutes, event count by country, event count by gender, events per session, app version, app build, and app environment.
